### Checklist
- [ ] Code is in **English** (variables, functions, classes, comments)
- [ ] **Docstrings** on all public functions
- [ ] **Type hints** complete
- [ ] **Tests** written and passing
- [ ] `ruff check` passes
- [ ] `mypy` passes
- [ ] **Spec ID** in every commit `[ODAI-XXX]`
- [ ] **Security review** requested (if touches data/auth/LLM)
- [ ] **Eval LLM** passes (if touches prompts)
- [ ] **No secrets** in code, logs, or error messages
- [ ] **Max 300 lines** per file (or justified)
